title: Breast lump documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

referral.text: Supports clinician recognition of an unexplained breast lump and age-qualified nipple or skin changes for referral consideration; it does not assert cancer or generate a referral decision.
referral.rationale: Relevant only to clinician-assessed breast findings with recommendation qualifiers retained.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports clinician recognition of an unexplained breast lump and age-qualified nipple or skin changes for referral consideration; it does not assert cancer or generate a referral decision.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.4.1–1.4.3 — breast cancer recognition and referral

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, sex, site, duration, examination, pregnancy, lactation, infection, trauma, imaging and prior history are absent.
No lump, malignancy, imaging, urgency or referral is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
